intended_use: CINA-CSpine is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of cervical spine CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and appr
intended_use_full: CINA-CSpine is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of cervical spine CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and appropriately trained physician specialists by flagging and communication of suspected positive findings compatible with acute cervical spine fractures including non-displaced fracture lines and/or displaced fracture fragments.
target_condition: Acute cervical spine fractures (non-displaced fracture lines and/or displaced fracture fragments)
ground_truth: Consensus of three US board-certified expert radiologists
other_metrics: Time-to-notification (all cases): mean 2.9 ± 1.1 minutes (median 2.6, 95% CI 2.7-3.0, range 1.0-6.8); Time-to-notification (true positive cases only): mean 2.8 ± 1.2 minutes (median 2.6, 95% CI 2.6-3.0, range 1.0-6.8)
